name: Stir-Fried Artichokes with Pea Pods & Black M
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour boiling water over the mushrooms and let stand for 10 minutes.
2. Drain and set aside.
3. Cook artichokes in boiling, salted water until just tender (about 10 minutes). Drain and set aside.
4. When cool, cut each artichoke in half.
5. Heat oil in a wok.
6. Stir-fry artichoke halves, pea pods, and mushrooms for 1 minute.
7. Add stock, cover, and simmer until the vegetables are tender (do not overcook; they do not need long).
8. Whisk together the remaining ingredients in a small bowl and add to the wok.
9. Cook and stir for an additional 2 minutes.
10. Serve.
